ItemDataXML.Name: Bone Meal
ItemDataXML.Desc: A mash of ground bones, meat and other umm stuff. It can be used as an organic fertilizer for crops, flowers and grass.

ItemDataXML.Name: Chance
ItemDataXML.Desc: Pick a card, any card. What's your card? Who knows! They all have question marks on them.

ItemDataXML.Name: Ice Arrow
ItemDataXML.Desc: When you hit an enemy with this arrow, they will be frozen to the spot for a short time. Enemies will have brief respite from an immediate follow up freeze attack due to their freeze effect immunity.

ItemDataXML.Name: Sapphire Gem Stone
ItemDataXML.Desc: Sapphire gemstones are extracted from Sapphire containing rock in the furnace. Used in jewelry.

ItemDataXML.Name: Ring Of Ice
ItemDataXML.Desc: An Enchanted Sapphire Ring. If you strike an enemy while wearing this ring, they will be frozen to the spot for a short time. Enemies will have brief respite from an immediate follow up freeze attack due to their freeze effect immunity.

ItemDataXML.Name: Unknown Amulet
ItemDataXML.Desc: An Enchanted Sapphire Amulet. The properties of this Amulet are a mystery.

ItemDataXML.Name: Unknown Necklace
ItemDataXML.Desc: An Enchanted Sapphire Necklace. The properties of this Necklace are a mystery.

ItemDataXML.Name: Titanium Katana
ItemDataXML.Desc: The ultimate Katana. A brutal weapon for brutal warriors.

ItemDataXML.Name: Sky World
ItemDataXML.Desc: A flat world without ground.

ItemDataXML.Name: Space World
ItemDataXML.Desc: A flat world without ground or sky, just the stars, sun and moon.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Hide
ItemDataXML.Desc: Troll hide is as tough as stone, whilst being supple enough to use for ranged armor.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Hide Body
ItemDataXML.Desc: Mid level Armor for Ranged combat. Troll hide is as tough as stone while providing enough give to be useful for rangers. Gives a generous ranged bonus.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Hide Leggings
ItemDataXML.Desc: Mid level Armor for Ranged combat. Troll hide is as tough as stone while providing enough give to be useful for rangers. Gives a generous ranged bonus.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Hide Helmet
ItemDataXML.Desc: Mid level Armor for Ranged combat. Troll hide is as tough as stone while providing enough give to be useful for rangers. Gives a generous ranged bonus.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Hide Boots
ItemDataXML.Desc: Mid level Armor for Ranged combat. Troll hide is as tough as stone while providing enough give to be useful for rangers. Gives a generous ranged bonus.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Hide Gauntlets
ItemDataXML.Desc: Mid level Armor for Ranged combat. Troll hide is as tough as stone while providing enough give to be useful for rangers. Gives a generous ranged bonus.

ItemDataXML.Name: Golden Bow
ItemDataXML.Desc: A low level bow that offers more power, speed and durability than a wood bow. Looks better too, you can impress your friends with this fancy item.

ItemDataXML.Name: Spider Bow
ItemDataXML.Desc: A mid level bow for mid level rangers. Spiders don't like this bow.

ItemDataXML.Name: Troll Bow
ItemDataXML.Desc: A mid to high level bow. Good power, speed and durability. I troll you not.

ItemDataXML.Name: Titanium Bow
ItemDataXML.Desc: The ultimate standard bow. Unmatched for power, speed and durability. Strike fear into your enemies with this distinctive titanium design.

ItemDataXML.Name: Natural World
ItemDataXML.Desc: A flat world with natural surface and rock layers.

ItemDataXML.Name: Folder Icon
ItemDataXML.Desc: A Folder Icon.

ItemDataXML.Name: Grenade Tex
ItemDataXML.Desc: Grenade Texture.

ItemDataXML.Name: Ruby War Hammer
ItemDataXML.Desc: A powerful, high level War Hammer crafted from pure Ruby.

ItemDataXML.Name: Titanium War Hammer
ItemDataXML.Desc: The ultimate War Hammer, crafted from titanium.

ItemDataXML.Name: Copper Ingot
ItemDataXML.Desc: Copper bars are smelted from natural Copper in the furnace.

ItemDataXML.Name: Tin Ingot
ItemDataXML.Desc: Tin bars are smelted from Cassiterite in the furnace.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bronze Ingot
ItemDataXML.Desc: Bronze bars are smelted from Copper and Tin in the furnace.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bronze Hoe
ItemDataXML.Desc: Use this tool on grass and dirt to till it for growing crops. Don't forget to irrigate the tilled earth!

ItemDataXML.Name: Bronze Scythe
ItemDataXML.Desc: Use this tool to harvest your crops. It is slow and doesn't give the best harvest but it's good for novice farmers. Try not to harvest crops before they've fully grown, otherwise a poor harvest ye will reap.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bronze Arrow
ItemDataXML.Desc: Basic ammunition for ranged weapons.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bronze Spear
ItemDataXML.Desc: This spear is primitive but better than the wood version and will last longer.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bronze Sword
ItemDataXML.Desc: This sword is primitive but better than the wood version and will last longer.

ItemDataXML.Name: Chisel
ItemDataXML.Desc: Used to polish stone.

ItemDataXML.Name: Wand
ItemDataXML.Desc: Recite some spell here.

ItemDataXML.Name: Chat Icon
ItemDataXML.Desc: A Text Chat Icon.

ItemDataXML.Name: Decal Applicator
ItemDataXML.Desc: Apply decals to solid blocks by swinging the applicator at a block. The decal you select will be remembered until you unequip the applicator.

ItemDataXML.Name: Dark Staff
ItemDataXML.Desc: Staves are less useful than a wood spear. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Light Staff
ItemDataXML.Desc: Staves are less useful than a wood spear. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Spider Staff
ItemDataXML.Desc: Staves are less useful than a wood spear. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Nature Staff
ItemDataXML.Desc: Staves are less useful than a wood spear. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Ocean Staff
ItemDataXML.Desc: Staves are less useful than a wood spear. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Necromancer Staff
ItemDataXML.Desc: Staves are less useful than a wood spear. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Yliaster Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Yliaster is Prima Materia, the formless base of all matter which is the raw material for the alchemical Great Work. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Eitr Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Eitr is a mythical substance. This liquid substance is the origin of all living things. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Ichor Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Ichor is the ethereal fluid that is the blood of the gods. It is considered to be lethally toxic to mortals. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Revolver
ItemDataXML.Desc: Hand Revolver. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Eldar Pistol
ItemDataXML.Desc: Eldar Pistol. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Golden SMG
ItemDataXML.Desc: Golden sub machine gun. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Spider SMG
ItemDataXML.Desc: Spider sub machine gun. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Laser Blaster
ItemDataXML.Desc: Laser blaster. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Combo Assault Rifle
ItemDataXML.Desc: Combo assault rifle. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Sniper Rifle
ItemDataXML.Desc: Sniper rifle. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Assault Rifle
ItemDataXML.Desc: Assault rifle. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Shotgun
ItemDataXML.Desc: Shotgun. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Mini Gun
ItemDataXML.Desc: Mini gun. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Heavy Assault Rifle
ItemDataXML.Desc: Heavy assault rifle. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Semi Auto Hand Gun
ItemDataXML.Desc: Semi automatic hand gun. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Plasma Rifle
ItemDataXML.Desc: Plasma rifle. Guns have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bullet
ItemDataXML.Desc: Bullet. Bullets have no use and are intended for gun scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Magic Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Magic Potion. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Vapor Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Vapor Potion. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Essencia Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Essencia forms a natural barrier around one's soul, protecting it from the damage of magical attacks. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Astro Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Astro Potion. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Earth Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Earth Potion. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Aestus Flask
ItemDataXML.Desc: Aestus is the essence of heat. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Dwarven Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Dwarven Potion. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Ectoplasm Flask
ItemDataXML.Desc: Ectoplasm is a supernatural viscous substance that exudes from the body of a medium during a spiritualistic trance and forms the material for the manifestation of spirits. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Volatile Concoction
ItemDataXML.Desc: Volatile Concoction. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Skooma Flask
ItemDataXML.Desc: Distilled from Moon Sugar. Sacred to those who worship the moons and stars. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Resplendent Mixture
ItemDataXML.Desc: Resplendent Mixture. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Karmic Potion
ItemDataXML.Desc: Karmic extract is a dense opaque liquid with almost no viscosity. Extracted from the waste of a damaged soul, capable of manifesting itself darkly. Potions are less useful than a bottle of water. Intended for magic scripters.

ItemDataXML.Name: Apple
ItemDataXML.Desc: Get a few of these bad boys when you really want to avoid your annual checkup.

ItemDataXML.Name: Orange
ItemDataXML.Desc: Not to be compared with apples. The word for the color orange actually came after the fruit was named orange. Very tasty yum yum.

ItemDataXML.Name: Plum
ItemDataXML.Desc: Plum is yum! A small fruit that grows in trees, and are also known as prunes when dried. Possibly one of the first fruits humans domesticated.

ItemDataXML.Name: Olives
ItemDataXML.Desc: Olives can be prepared in many tasty ways, so you might as well have a garden of them.

ItemDataXML.Name: Cherries
ItemDataXML.Desc: Delightful red fruit you can eat right off the stem. Don't forget to spit out the seed!

ItemDataXML.Name: Strawberries
ItemDataXML.Desc: Contrary to the name, these aren't actually berries. Doesn't make them any less tasty, though.

ItemDataXML.Name: Blueberries
ItemDataXML.Desc: Berries which are blue. Blueberries are in fact blue berries, although only the skin is blue.

ItemDataXML.Name: Banana
ItemDataXML.Desc: One of the biggest berries. Now, should I give it to a monkey, or pretend it's a phone? Or maybe I'll just eat it.

ItemDataXML.Name: Lemon
ItemDataXML.Desc: A sour citrus fruit, popularly used to decorate the rims of tea glasses. Pretty good with salt.

ItemDataXML.Name: Lime
ItemDataXML.Desc: Limes are a citrus fruit even more sour than a lemon, but goes very well with a surprising amount of food dishes.

ItemDataXML.Name: Grapes
ItemDataXML.Desc: Grapes are fruit that grow off of a vine, and are a tasty fruit to snack on from time to time. So you could say they're pretty grape.

ItemDataXML.Name: Raspberries
ItemDataXML.Desc: Raspberries are a fun cluster of fruit you can put on the ends of your fingers. They have a distinct dryness on the surface, but are nice and tasty once you start to chew.

ItemDataXML.Name: Gooseberries
ItemDataXML.Desc: Duckberry... duckberry... duckberry... duckberryyyy.... gooseberry!

ItemDataXML.Name: Grapefruit
ItemDataXML.Desc: Grapefruits are not grape fruits, they are grapefruits. Grapefruits are citrus fruits, while grape fruits are not. Grapefruits and grape fruits don't even look remotely the same!

ItemDataXML.Name: Blackberries
ItemDataXML.Desc: Blackberries are like raspberries, but they are more smooth on the outside and have a different taste. Blackberries are actually more purpley than black.

ItemDataXML.Name: Unused9
ItemDataXML.Desc: Unused

ItemDataXML.Name: Unused10
ItemDataXML.Desc: Unused

ItemDataXML.Name: Unused11
ItemDataXML.Desc: Unused

ItemDataXML.Name: Potato
ItemDataXML.Desc: Plant this potato onto irrigated tilled earth to grow crops.

ItemDataXML.Name: Corn Cobb
ItemDataXML.Desc: Plant this cobb onto irrigated tilled earth to grow crops.

ItemDataXML.Name: Rosemary
ItemDataXML.Desc: Rosemary is an herb commonly used as seasoning for food, and sometimes for soaps, having a somewhat minty somewhat peppery flavor.

ItemDataXML.Name: Oregano
ItemDataXML.Desc: Oregano is a plant commonly used to add an herby flavor to foods such as meat, pizza, and pasta.

ItemDataXML.Name: Thyme
ItemDataXML.Desc: It's thyme for time! Thyme is a plant used to add flavor to meat, veggies, fish, and baked goods.

ItemDataXML.Name: Sage
ItemDataXML.Desc: Sage adds an earthy flavor to your dishes, but it also has some medical uses sometimes.

ItemDataXML.Name: Tarragon
ItemDataXML.Desc: Tarragon is a leafy green herb that is highly aromatic with a subtle licorice flavor.

ItemDataXML.Name: Dill
ItemDataXML.Desc: An herb most commonly known for its association with pickles.

ItemDataXML.Name: Basil
ItemDataXML.Desc: Basil is an herb commonly used in many dishes, adding a somewhat sweet and peppery flavor to whatever it is you're seasoning.

ItemDataXML.Name: Bay leaves
ItemDataXML.Desc: These are used in dishes to change the scent of the dish rather than the flavor. They actually taste quite bitter on their own.

ItemDataXML.Name: Parsley
ItemDataXML.Desc: Parsley on its own has a fresh earthy flavor and is frequently used for garnish.

ItemDataXML.Name: Chives
ItemDataXML.Desc: Chives are similar to green onions, though are smaller and more delicate without an actual bulb. It goes well with certain foods.

ItemDataXML.Name: Mint
ItemDataXML.Desc: Minty fresh! Chewing on this plant produces a fresh taste, and is used for many things, ranging from tea to candy to toothpaste.

ItemDataXML.Name: Coriander
ItemDataXML.Desc: Commonly known as Cilantro, it's commonly used in cooking. Some people love the taste, some think it tastes like soap.

ItemDataXML.Name: Majoram
ItemDataXML.Desc: An herb frequently used for medicinal values, but also used in foods, such as salad dressing or meat dishes.

ItemDataXML.Name: Lavender
ItemDataXML.Desc: A flower known for its scent. Pinching and twisting the purple head of these can make your fingers smell lovely. Sometimes used in cooking.

ItemDataXML.Name: Fennel
ItemDataXML.Desc: It may look like a type of onion, but it's actually more like a carrot. It's leaves are used as garnish, its roots as a substitute for carrots, and its bulb as its own ingredient.

ItemDataXML.Name: Cornbread
ItemDataXML.Desc: Sweet bread made with corn, a staple cuisine from the Native Americans. Can never get enough of the stuff.

ItemDataXML.Name: Potato Pie
ItemDataXML.Desc: Potato and Meat Pie. Not as sweet as an apple pie, believe it or not.

ItemDataXML.Name: Debug Tool
ItemDataXML.Desc: Used to Debug NPC AI. Swing this at an NPC, and its behavior tree will appear on your screen.

ItemDataXML.Name: Block Replacer
ItemDataXML.Desc: This tool replaces the block you're targeting with the block in the other hand.

ItemDataXML.Name: Obsidian Shard
ItemDataXML.Desc: A shard of pure obsidian, extracted from an obsidian block. It has magical properties.

ItemDataXML.Name: zLastItemID
ItemDataXML.Desc: zLastItemID
